title: Positive flow: User grants permission to use location services
preconditions: The user is on the permission request page for the Weather Live app.
test_data: Location services are enabled on the user's device.
test_steps: Open the Weather Live app. | Navigate to the permission request page. | Click on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button.
expected_result: The user is granted permission to use location services, and the app proceeds to the main screen with location-based weather information.

title: Negative flow: User denies permission to use location services
preconditions: The user is on the permission request page for the Weather Live app.
test_data: Location services are disabled on the user's device.
test_steps: Open the Weather Live app. | Navigate to the permission request page. | Click on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button.
expected_result: The user is denied permission to use location services, and the app displays a message indicating that location-based weather information cannot be provided.

title: Negative flow: User clicks on the privacy policy link
preconditions: The user is on the permission request page for the Weather Live app.
test_data: The user clicks on the 'Privacy Policy' link.
test_steps: Open the Weather Live app. | Navigate to the permission request page. | Click on the 'Privacy Policy' link.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the privacy policy page, and the permission request page remains open.

title: Negative flow: User clicks on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button multiple times
preconditions: The user is on the permission request page for the Weather Live app.
test_data: The user clicks on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button multiple times.
test_steps: Open the Weather Live app. | Navigate to the permission request page. | Click on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button multiple times.
expected_result: The user is granted permission to use location services, and the app proceeds to the main screen with location-based weather information.

title: Negative flow: User clicks on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button while location services are disabled
preconditions: The user is on the permission request page for the Weather Live app.
test_data: Location services are disabled on the user's device.
test_steps: Open the Weather Live app. | Navigate to the permission request page. | Click on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button while location services are disabled.
expected_result: The user is denied permission to use location services, and the app displays a message indicating that location-based weather information cannot be provided.

title: Negative flow: User clicks on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button while location services are enabled
preconditions: The user is on the permission request page for the Weather Live app.
test_data: Location services are enabled on the user's device.
test_steps: Open the Weather Live app. | Navigate to the permission request page. | Click on the 'OK, I UNDERSTAND' button while location services are enabled.
expected_result: The user is granted permission to use location services, and the app proceeds to the main screen with location-based weather information.
